text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're late, Trainer! I was just about to come get
you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. What a good trainee, right? Amazing,
right? Go on, shower me with praise!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I got a good night's sleep, so I was up early today!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So I'm all ready for today's training! Come on,
let's go! ♪
